_method: Hand-derived from the fixture inputs by 4-gate reasoning, not from engine output.

expected_findings._derivation: nic-db1 is tagged sensitive=true (tier=data). Its effective rules include the default AllowVnetInBound (priority 65000, Allow) with NO higher-precedence DenyVnetInBound override, so the sensitive data NIC is reachable VNet-wide (east-west) -> missing tier segmentation, High.

trap_assertions.must_not_have: internet-exposure reachable finding — although its default route is Internet, no inbound NSG rule allows an internet (0.0.0.0/0) source and it has no public IP, so the internet path is not open.
